pr.title: Non-Record: 11L Parallel Muon + LN Scale + LeakyReLU² MLP3x + Legal TTT — val_bpb 1.1215 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: 11-layer transformer pairs Parallel Muon banking and batched Newton-Schulz with depth-scaled LN, LeakyReLU² MLP3x, and legal score-first TTT SGD.
